# AEDLER

> AEDLER is a European premium brand of shower trays, bathtubs and drains, built on the patented **Stabildense®** multi-layer composite technology. A brand of the Schedpol group with 45+ years of manufacturing experience, made in one certified facility in north-western Poland and available in over a dozen European countries. The signature Stabildense® tray composite weighs just **9 kg/m²** while withstanding loads up to **1500 kg** and heavy impact.

## Key facts
- Brand of Schedpol Sp. z o.o. (est. 1981), Made in Poland.
- Core technology: Stabildense® — patented/registered 5-layer composite (premium acrylic, composite layer, insulating foam, metal reinforcement, stabilizing system).
- Ultralight & durable: composite tray material ≈ 9 kg/m²; compressive load up to 1500 kg; impact-resistant.
- Product range: shower trays (composite, integrated, under-tile, acrylic), bathtubs, linear/point/under-tile drains with 663 cover-panel designs, installation carriers & panels. 1900+ SKU.
- Standards & certificates: PN-EN 14527:2006+A1:2012, PN-EN 251:2013-04, PN-EN 16165:2022 (method A, classes A–C — TÜV Rheinland), PN-EN 1253; CE (EN) compliance and hygiene certificates.
- Sustainability: closed-loop ultra-dense EPS recycling (100% production waste reprocessed), 92% EU-sourced materials, 100% renewable energy, 0 freon emissions, 15+ years warranty.
- Reach: exports from north-western Poland to 15+ European markets; 180+ distributors.
- Cooperation models (B2B): Aedler brand, Private Label (MOQ from 1 unit, mixed pallets), dedicated series, dropshipping.
- Renovation system: ready-made bath-to-shower replacement without demolition.
- Website languages: English, German, French, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Romanian.
